title: Objective
description: Defines the goal of a governed run.

domain_id.description: Reference to the domain this objective belongs to.

objective_type.description: The category or type of this objective within its domain.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this objective requires.

success_criteria.description: List of criteria that define a successful outcome.

constraints_ref.description: Reference to the constraints document that applies to this objective.

evaluation_profile_ref.description: Reference to the evaluation profile used to assess candidates for this objective.
